jsonLd.title: CarTrade is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
CarTrade invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CarTrade:
CarTrade is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarTrade!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
